rules.name: Guru-Mangala Yoga
rules.description: Jupiter and Mars combine wisdom with initiative.
rules.effects: Supports enterprise, technical execution, and strategic courage.

rules.name: Royal Counsel Combination
rules.description: Sun and Mercury produce leadership intelligence.
rules.effects: Strengthens policy skill, advisory influence, and executive clarity.

rules.name: Lakshmi Prosperity Flow
rules.effects: Supports fortune, patronage, and status accumulation.
